# Nuxt AI Images

> Minimal Nuxt 4 + Nuxt UI template for AI image generation products. Use it as an anchor repo when starting new OpenAI or Google image pipelines.

## What it is

- File-based routes: `/` (landing), `/dashboard` (studio), `/dashboard/settings`.
- Server routes `POST /api/image/*` ‚Äî one path per image model; OpenAI or Google GenAI (keys in `.env`).
- `POST /api/text/enhance-prompt`, `POST /api/text/surprise-prompt` ‚Äî OpenAI chat helpers for the studio.
- Pinia store `useStudioStore`, composable `useGenerateImage`.
- Dashboard shell: `USidebar`, studio 12-column grid, semantic tokens (`text-highlighted`, `bg-default`, etc.).

## Key files

- `docs/DECISIONS.md` ‚Äî rationale for stack, route naming, and docs split
- `docs/IMAGE_PIPELINE.md` ‚Äî routes, POST bodies, `app/utils` + `server/utils` map
- `docs/GEMINI_NANO_BANANA.md` ‚Äî Gemini image models, prompting, grounding, limits
- `app/utils/studioImageModels.ts` ‚Äî allowed image model IDs
- `app/utils/geminiImageUtils.ts` ‚Äî shared clamps, aspect ratios, imageConfig builder
- `server/api/image/*.post.ts` ‚Äî thin handlers per model
- `server/utils/geminiImage.ts` ‚Äî Gemini streaming and data URL extraction
- `server/utils/promptAssistOpenAi.ts` ‚Äî enhance / surprise prompt
- `docs/PERFORMANCE.md` ‚Äî budgets and Core Web Vitals habits
- `docs/AI_SEO.md` ‚Äî llms.txt, structured pages, citations

## Links

- [Nuxt UI](https://ui.nuxt.com/)
- [Nuxt](https://nuxt.com/)
- [VueUse Motion](https://motion.vueuse.org/)

## Contact / customization

Fork this template and replace branding (`AppLogo`, `app.config.ts` colors, copy on landing and dashboard).
